items.title: The Log is the Agent
items.summary: Most agent frameworks are built around the language model: a conversation loop comes first, then tools, then rules, and finally a logging layer bolted on for observability, with state persisted as retrievable “memory.” We describe ActiveGraph, a runtime that inverts this arrangement.
